data.title: Monero Reports Progress on FCMP++ and CARROT Development
data.description: Monero has announced significant progress in the development of its Full Chain Membership Proof (FCMP++) and CARROT projects. According to Foresight News, the latest version of the alpha stressnet software has been released, and developers are now planning an audit for the beta stressnet and CARROT integration.

data.title: River Stablecoin Protocol Experiences Significant Surge Amid Market Weakness
data.description:
River (RIVER), a decentralized finance stablecoin protocol, has seen a remarkable increase of nearly 750% over the past month, reaching an all-time high of $48.56. According to NS3.AI, this surge occurs despite the broader market's weakness. The rally is attributed to an $8 million strategic investment from Justin Sun, which aims to enhance River's infrastructure on the TRON network.

Analysts have expressed concerns over the excessive futures trading volume compared to spot volume, suggesting potential market manipulation and increased liquidation risk. This has led to caution among market observers, who are predicting a possible price decline for River in the near future.

data.title: Thailand's SEC plans to introduce regulatory rules for cryptocurrency ETFs and futures this year.
data.description: The Thai Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is developing rules to support crypto ETFs, crypto futures trading, and tokenized investment products. SEC Deputy Secretary Jomkwan Kongsakul stated that formal guidelines for crypto ETFs are expected to be released this year, allowing investors to allocate related assets without needing to manage their own wallets. He also suggested treating crypto assets as "another asset class," with a maximum allocation of 5% in a diversified portfolio. The SEC also plans to include crypto assets within the framework of the Derivatives Act, launch crypto futures on the Thai Futures Exchange (TFEX), and tighten regulations on "financial influencers," requiring those making profit promises or investment advice to possess investment advisory or intermediary licenses. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Benson Sun: Bitcoin may fluctuate between $85,000 and $95,000, with insufficient interest from off-exchange funds.
data.description: Crypto KOL and former FTX community partner Benson Sun stated, "Trump has once again 'TACO' (Trump backs down), but US stocks have rebounded to where they started their decline, while Bitcoin remains significantly below its starting point. Currently, off-market funds still lack sufficient interest in BTC, making it difficult to break through $100,000. The subsequent price action is likely to fluctuate widely between $85,000 and $95,000. He cautioned that bulls should avoid overly long-term strategies and focus on flexible trading."

data.title: Newly Created Address Receives Significant WLFI and ETH Transfers
data.description: A newly created address has received substantial transfers of WLFI and ETH. According to Odaily, the address (0x55b...0E6E) obtained 6.27 million WLFI tokens, valued at $1.06 million, and 324.85 ETH, valued at $980,000, from BitGo.

data.title: Thailand SEC to Launch Cryptocurrency ETFs and Futures Trading
data.description: Thailand's Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is preparing to implement new regulations that will allow cryptocurrency exchange-traded funds (ETFs) and futures trading on the Thailand Futures Exchange. According to NS3.AI, the guidelines for establishing crypto ETFs are anticipated to be unveiled early this year, coinciding with the introduction of a market-making system. Furthermore, the SEC plans to officially acknowledge cryptocurrencies as a formal asset class under the Derivatives Act.

data.title: Bitget has launched USD-based SKR and ACU perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched USDT-based SKR and ACU perpetual contracts, with maximum leverage ratios of 20x and 10x respectively. A contract trading bot will also be available simultaneously. Additionally, participants can join the SKR CandyBomb event, completing specific contract trading volume tasks to earn airdrop rewards. A single participant can receive up to 3,333 SKR, with a total prize pool of 666,666 SKR. The event ends on January 28th at 10:00 AM (UTC+8).

data.title: Gate.com releases its Q4 2025 report: Both spot and derivatives businesses maintained their industry-leading position during the month.
data.description: Cryptocurrency trading platform Gate officially released its Q4 2025 report, showcasing continued growth momentum from the end of last year. According to multiple monthly reports from CoinDesk, Gate was one of the fastest-growing centralized exchanges in Q4, maintaining its leading position in both spot and derivatives businesses. Gate's global spot market share rose to a record high of 6.04% in October, ranking second globally. In the derivatives sector, Gate's market share continued to climb in Q4, reaching 11% in December, with a cumulative growth of 9.32% for the year, the highest growth rate among all centralized exchanges. As of the end of the quarter, the platform had nearly 50 million registered users, listing over 4,300 assets. The app version 8.0 was upgraded in December, further optimizing the multi-scenario trading and asset management experience. Focusing on its core products and ecosystem mechanisms, Gate continued to make strides in Launchpool, Launchpad, HODLer Airdrop, and CandyDrop, achieving record highs in multiple metrics within the quarter. Gate's core asset size and activity metrics remained on an upward trend, with subscriptions exceeding $11 billion in the quarter. In terms of on-chain trading, Gate Perp DEX officially entered the large-scale trading phase, with its first full quarter's on-chain transaction volume exceeding $10 billion. Regarding security and compliance, Gate's total reserves reached $11.676 billion in the fourth quarter, with a total reserve ratio of 124%. Gate Technology Ltd, a Maltese subsidiary of Gate Group, obtained a MiCA license from the Malta Financial Services Authority (MFSA), and Gate Australia officially launched. Gate also connected with the global community through offline events, sponsoring the Token of Love Music Festival in Singapore and hosting numerous high-profile brand events and VVIP dinners at important events such as TOKEN2049 and the F1 Singapore Grand Prix. With a focus on product evolution and experience upgrades, Gate's Web3 strategy is gradually translating into tangible user value.

data.title: Tokenization of Real-World Assets Gains Momentum at Davos 2026
data.description: Davos 2026 has underscored the tokenization of real-world assets (RWAs) as a significant theme, with the market surpassing $21 billion in total value locked. According to NS3.AI, major institutional entities such as BlackRock, BNY Mellon, and Euroclear are actively deploying tokenized products on a large scale, facilitated by regulatory clarity achieved in 2025. Industry experts anticipate that tokenization could expand to between $2 trillion and $16 trillion by 2030, indicating a transition from pilot programs to the integration of enterprise-grade financial infrastructure.

data.title: Tencent Requests Removal of GitHub Projects Over Privacy Concerns
data.description: Tencent has formally requested GitHub to remove several open-source projects that allow users to export or analyze their WeChat chat records. According to PANews, some project leaders have publicly stated that they have ceased maintenance due to legal pressure. On January 22, Tencent responded, explaining that these projects read WeChat chat records by reverse engineering the client and cracking local database keys. This bypasses encryption measures, posing risks to user and third-party data privacy and client security, and could be exploited by malicious entities.

data.title: Uniswap founder explains pricing discrepancies in prediction markets: Not a user structure issue, but rather due to differences in event definitions and rules.
data.description: In an article published on the X platform, Uniswap founder Hayden Adams pointed out that the prediction market Kalshi prices the "US acquisition of Greenland" at approximately 42%, while Polymarket prices it at only 15%–23%. This significant price difference is not due to differences in user groups, but rather to the differences in the specific betting targets themselves. If it were merely a difference in user structure, a single trader with access to both platforms could quickly close the price gap through arbitrage. However, the reality is that Polymarket prices the "probability of the event occurring within 2026 (currently around 23%)," while Kalshi prices the "probability of the event occurring throughout Trump's entire term (currently around 45%)." These are not the same event. Furthermore, differences in question wording, settlement conditions, oracle design, and different risk pricing logic all contribute to the price discrepancies.

data.title: KuCoin and Jinjun Services have reached an investment agreement, intending to jointly promote an integrated gold industry platform with the Hong Kong Gold Exchange.
data.description: KuCoin announced today that it has reached an equity investment agreement with King Coin Services Limited and will support its in-depth cooperation with the Hong Kong Gold Exchange (HKGX) to jointly promote the construction of a comprehensive gold industry chain platform integrating trading, settlement, warehousing, and related management functions. Against the backdrop of the accelerated upgrading of the Hong Kong gold market, this cooperation aims to improve the efficiency of cross-regional circulation and collaboration in the gold market through technology and system integration. This strategic investment aims to promote the integration of digital technology and the physical gold industry, and help build a more efficient and transparent gold industry ecosystem.

data.title: Binance to Conduct Wallet Maintenance for BNB Smart Chain on January 23
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to perform wallet maintenance for the BNB Smart Chain (BEP20) on January 23, 2026, starting at 07:00 (UTC). To facilitate this maintenance, deposits and withdrawals on the BNB Smart Chain (BEP20) will be temporarily suspended beginning at 06:55 (UTC) on the same day. The maintenance is expected to last approximately one hour.

During this period, the trading of tokens on the BNB Smart Chain network will remain unaffected, ensuring that users can continue their trading activities without interruption. Binance has assured users that all technical requirements related to the maintenance will be managed by the platform, and there is no need for user intervention. Once the network is deemed stable, deposits and withdrawals will be reopened, although no further announcements will be made regarding this process.

Binance emphasizes that the maintenance is a routine procedure aimed at ensuring the continued stability and security of the network. Users are advised to plan their transactions accordingly, considering the temporary suspension of deposit and withdrawal services. The platform remains committed to providing a seamless experience for its users and will resume full services as soon as the maintenance is completed.

data.title: South Korea’s largest crypto exchange Upbit announced it will list HeyElsa (ELSA) on the KRW, BTC, and USDT markets, with support for the Base network only. ELSA is the native token of the DeFAI platform HeyElsa, used for staking and fee discounts.
